issues.description: Second effect uses trigger 'Trigger' without specifying what triggers it. Card text only describes a Main effect (K.O. up to 1 opponent's rested Character with cost ≤4). No secondary triggered effect is mentioned. This effect should be removed entirely.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is missing the 'rested' condition. Card text explicitly states 'rested Characters'. Target should include a condition filter for resting state.
